summary: Phase 1.5 seller stage classifier: rules baseline ported from Phase 1 TypeScript router, RandomForest training on backtest features with class_weight=balanced, ML inference signature, and rules-vs-ML comparison report. CLI train-seller-stage writes metrics and training log JSON.

criticalFindings.description: Tiny synthetic datasets may yield single-class eval splits; train/eval fallback uses stratified shop holdout. — Rationale: Integration tests use small fixtures; production backtest runs use larger n_shops.

interfaceChanges.description: Deterministic rules baseline mirroring web seller-stage-router.
Train RandomForest on backtest features; writes metrics.json and training_log.json.
Rules-vs-ML comparison with agreement_rate and disagreements.

mappings.criterion: CLI train entrypoint writes metrics JSON
Comparison report agreement rate and disagreements
Golden profiles expected stage from rules baseline
ML inference golden profiles valid class and confidence

findings.description: Tiny synthetic datasets may yield single-class eval splits; train/eval fallback uses stratified shop holdout. — Rationale: Integration tests use small fixtures; production backtest runs use larger n_shops.
